name: GitHub Commit Summary
description:
Takes a start and end date plus a repo, lists all commits in that date range, fetches files changed and commit messages for each, and produces a concise summary of activity.

INPUT (plain text): Provide owner/repo (or owner and repo), start_date (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO), and end_date (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO). Example: 'agntcy/ai-market, 2024-01-01 to 2024-03-31' or 'owner: agntcy, repo: ai-market, start: 2024-01-01, end: 2024-03-31'.

TOOLS: Use list_commits with since and until (ISO 8601, e.g. 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z and 2024-03-31T23:59:59Z). Then call get_commit for each commit to get the full message and list of files changed. Aggregate the data.

OUTPUT: A plain-text report with: (1) Summary paragraph of activity in the period; (2) List of commits with message and files changed; (3) Overview of most-changed files and areas. Keep it readable and scannable. Do not output JSON unless asked.
